collection_method: Compare result, exact contract state equation, owner roles, allocation disposition, behavior-call sequence, and failure result.
pass_rule: Exact equality; no invalid access before a trap or abort.
failure_consequence: Reject the cell and candidate before interpreting timing.

collection_method: Record initialize, move-out, relocate, replace, clone, clone_from, behavior, and destruction by logical owner ID.
pass_rule: Every owner has exactly one destination or destruction; no hidden clone, duplicate liveness, loss, or post-death access.

collection_method: Record common-adapter calls, layouts, requested/usable/live/peak/transient bytes, failures, releases, and owner tags.
pass_rule: Exact algorithm ceiling, same-shape call equivalence, and no candidate-private allocator or uncharged allocation.

collection_method: Count logical owners and every allocator event and byte field.
pass_rule: capacity=usize::MAX; all allocator calls and byte fields are exactly zero; move/drop counts remain exact by logical index.
failure_consequence: Reject the candidate; zero bytes never supply a memory benefit.

applies_to: Every standalone canonical primary operation cell
collection_method: Exact scheduled-mixture sign decision on raw within-block ratios for the full Williams-by-five-salt cycle of the exact target, payload, size, and workload shape.
pass_rule: The directed candidate/Rust claim passes at 1/5000 in every cell; 50*candidate_elapsed_ns < 51*rust_elapsed_ns is the strict success.
failure_consequence: Reject the operation gate and candidate.

collection_method: Build relocation-normalized reachable-text graph and interval union.
pass_rule: No unresolved indirect edge; mandatory union <=1.10 times Rust.

collection_method: Compare substrate interface, source/binary hashes, layouts, costs, allocator route, generic calls, provenance, and owning cursor.
pass_rule: All five substrate and cost hashes are identical; no private allocator, cursor, seal, generic path, or result-provenance substitute.
failure_consequence: Reject the arm before construction or measurement.

collection_method: Compare facts-on/off source, accepted semantics, producers, consumers, invalidators, retained checks, and optimized bodies.
pass_rule: Exact source and semantics; every fact path accounted; indeterminate fails closed.

applies_to: B-FIX on all three target layouts
collection_method: Compare source, diagnostics, DataLayout, raw IR, normalized hot instructions, calls, traps, alias metadata, vectorization, and counters.
pass_rule: Exact protected historical identity; normalization allowlist is empty.
failure_consequence: Reject the candidate before any score.

applies_to: B-P2 on all three target layouts
collection_method: Compare canonical source, output, DataLayout, raw IR, optimized access bodies, bounds, aliases, vectorization, calls, and counters.
pass_rule: Exact historical identity; no generation, retirement, reuse, metadata load, branch, indirection, call, or new fact.
failure_consequence: Reject the candidate before any score.

applies_to: H-FLATSET on all three target layouts
collection_method: Validate sorted-set oracle, comparison counts, moves, allocations, metadata, public dependency budget, and code.
pass_rule: Exact hidden oracle; no FAM-DENSE import, candidate recognition, per-slot occupancy, dummy payload, or per-item allocation.

applies_to: W-SMALL on all three target layouts
collection_method: Validate lengths 0..32, inline/spill ownership, allocation, first-spill moves, failure, removal, and destruction.
pass_rule: Exact visible witness ceilings and no candidate recognition.

applies_to: W-GAP on all three target layouts
collection_method: Validate prefix/suffix/gap oracle, exact move distance, growth, materialization, allocation, and destruction.
pass_rule: Front, middle, and back routes meet exact ceilings with no per-slot tag.

collection_method: Evaluate checked add, double, multiply, layout, isize, and usize premises without allocation or payload access.
pass_rule: Last-valid succeeds and first-invalid exits at the exact failed premise.
